recommendations.title: The Antichrist
recommendations.overview: An Italian nobleman seeks help after his paralyzed daughter becomes possessed by the spirit of a malevolent ancestress.

recommendations.title: The Legend of the Nahuala
recommendations.overview: Leo San Juan, an insecure child of nine years old, lives eternally frightened by horror stories that Nando tells his older brother. Within these stories it is 'The Legend of Nahuala', according to which, an old abandoned Casona is possessed by the sp

recommendations.title: The Devil's Candy
recommendations.overview: A struggling painter is possessed by satanic forces after he and his young family move into their dream home in rural Texas.

recommendations.title: Candyman: Day of the Dead
recommendations.overview: As the Day of the Dead celebration approaches the barrio of East Los Angeles, Caroline is challenged to control the horrifying legend of her ancestor, the "Candyman".

recommendations.title: Home Sweet Home: Rebirth
recommendations.overview: When a city is overrun with a demonically-possessed crowd, a cop must find the source of evil to save his family.

recommendations.title: Pelé: Birth of a Legend
recommendations.overview: The life story of Brazilian football legend, Pele.

recommendations.title: The Last Exorcism Part II
recommendations.overview: As Nell Sweetzer tries to build a new life, the evil force that once possessed her returns with an even more horrific plan.

recommendations.title: 100 Feet
recommendations.overview: After Marnie Watson kills her abusive husband in self-defense, she is condemned to house arrest... only to discover that the house is possessed by the enraged and violent spirit of her dead husband.

recommendations.title: Ninja III: The Domination
recommendations.overview: An aerobics instructor becomes a ruthless assassin after being possessed by a slain ninja's spirit, leading to a showdown with a martial arts expert.

recommendations.title: Mother Joan of the Angels
recommendations.overview: A Polish priest arrives at a convent hoping to save the Mother Superior who is supposedly possessed by eight demons.
